hostClass: Apple M4 (4P+6E), 24 GiB, macOS 27.0, Swift 6.2.4 — recorded 2026-06-11 on AC power
note: Thresholds are HOST-CLASS-RELATIVE and CI-UNTESTED: medians recorded on the machine above running `iris-bench smoke` (64 MiB buffer, 3 runs, 10^6 lookups, seed 0xc0ffee0015bad) — the release-preparation re-record on AC power (supersedes the earlier battery-power record, which it reproduces within 2%; methodology in Benchmarks/README.md). A different host class (e.g. a GitHub macos-15 runner) WILL produce different absolutes; on first CI run, replace these medians with that host's smoke output and keep the tolerance. Comparison is one-sided: throughput gates only on falling below baseline*(1-tolerance), latency only on exceeding baseline*(1+tolerance).
